clips.note: Reichstag fire wreckage/rubble — the Reichstag building caught fire
burned Reichstag interior debris — evidence of Nazi planning
Kroll Opera assembly hall, deputies seated — Reichstag voting
assembly hall under swastika banners — the Enabling Act
Hindenburg at podium addressing crowd — Hindenburg's speech, cabinet sworn in
Hitler at podium — Hitler as Chancellor
Nazi minister (Goebbels) at podium shouting — Goering on the Communist uprising
vast crowd in the Lustgarten Berlin — March 5 election under state control
cheering crowd with flags — majority still said no
